programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's evil plot to wipe their village off the map. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and team up with the felines to save the day. The only problem is -- they all hate dogs.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: Julian has struggled to belong ever since he was expelled from his former school for his treatment of Auggie Pullman. To transform his life, Julian's grandmother finally reveals her own story of courage. During her youth in Nazi-occupied France, a boy shelters her from mortal danger. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation, while the boy's mother risks eve

programme.title: Bonjour tristesse
programme.desc: At the height of summer, 18-year-old Cécile is relaxing by the French seaside with her father and falling in love with her new boyfriend. However, the arrival of her late mother's enigmatic friend soon turns her world upside down.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th President of the United States.

programme.title: No One Will Save You
programme.desc: Brynn finds solace within the walls of the home where she grew up until she's awakened one night by strange noises from unearthly intruders.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: As the Islanders continue exploring their new couplings, a surprise mailbox delivers postcards exposing the actions of those they left behind; the revelations rock both Casa Amor and the villa, leaving some wishing they could return to sender.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they must confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced. Fueled by revenge, a terrifying threat emerges from the shadows of the past to shatter Dom's world and destroy everything -- and everyone -- he loves.

programme.title: Velma: This Halloween Needs To Be More Special!
programme.desc: Velma and her crew scramble to find a sinister spell book within 24 hours to resurrect her, dodging a malevolent spirit's fury; as the Sexy Halloween bash looms, they confront their deepest terrors, fighting for their lives.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Paws in the City
programme.desc: A woman lands a job caring for a dachshund diva whose bark is worse than her bite, much like the dog's reclusive and handsome owner. What starts as a way to keep a roof over her head soon turns into an opportunity for lifelong success and love.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Novel Murders
programme.desc: Antiques expert Jennifer Shannon believes two items found at the scene of a murder are actually clues straight out of famous mystery stories.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: The Top Gun Naval Fighter Weapons School is where the best of the best train to refine their elite flying skills. But Maverick isn't only competing to be the top fighter pilot, he's also fighti

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

programme.title: Wrong Husband
programme.desc: After a mysterious death, Kaujak and Sapa are separated despite being promised to each other at birth. With the help of spirit guides, efforts are made to restore harmony.

programme.title: Fairyland
programme.desc: A father-daughter relationship evolves through an era of Bohemian decadence in the 1970s San Francisco to the sober and heartbreaking era of the AIDS crisis in the 1980s.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 90s
programme.desc: Black comedies explode in the '90s, with sitcoms written and produced by Black creators and featuring Black casts; however, no culture is immune to the toxicity of fame and power.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries
programme.desc: Gethsemane and Eamon investigate the death of a sea captain; Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper and Marco Grazzini star.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie

programme.title: Little jesus

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: Holiday Inn
programme.desc: In this Irving Berlin musical, Jim (Bing Crosby) and Lila are members of a performing trio who plan to quit and run a country hotel. programme.title: The Chi

programme.title: Nickel Boys
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis' college dreams are shattered when he's sentenced to Nickel Academy, a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with Turner, a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
programme.desc: Deadpool's peaceful existence comes crashing down when the Time Variance Authority recruits him to help safeguard the multiverse. He soon unites with his would-be pal, Wolverine, to complete the mission and save his world from an existential threat.

programme.title: Hair of the Bear
programme.desc: Suffering from debilitating anxiety and refusing to go to school, 16-year-old Tori is driven to stay with her grandfather in a remote frozen wilderness but unexpectedly finds herself caught up in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Solemates
